//: Single source of truth for the generated teammate ROSTER (name -> area, tier, model).
//generated: install.sh renders templates/agents/dev.md.tmpl once per entry in `agents`, splicing in the matching templates/agent-tiers/<tier>.md fragment.
//standalone: ctm-investigator / ctm-playwright-tester are NOT listed here — they keep their own templates/agents/<name>.md.tmpl. engine/roster.sh unions both sources; that union is what `ctm agent tools` / `ctm agent block show` enumerate.
//tools: Tool allow-lists deliberately live in agent-tools.json, NOT here — a project must be able to override them via .claude/agent-tools.json without touching this file.
//model: junior=haiku, medior=sonnet, senior=opus. The senior (opus) tier may only be LAUNCHED with explicit user permission — see the roster section of templates/SKILL.md.tmpl.
//color: Claude Code accepts exactly 8 named colors (red, blue, green, yellow, purple, orange, pink, cyan) — no hex, no shade variants, and an unknown name is silently ignored. So the tiers are separated by INTENSITY within a hue family instead: backend cool (cyan -> blue -> purple), frontend warm (yellow -> orange -> red). Area is readable from the temperature, seniority from the depth. The remaining two go to the standalone agents: ctm-playwright-tester=green, ctm-investigator=pink.
//naming: Every name in this file is prefixed 'ctm-' — the whole base roster (launch name AND task-manager --as identity, they are the same string, nothing stripped) lives in the 'ctm-' namespace. Custom, hand-added agents (via `ctm agent add`) live in the 'tm-' namespace instead, and add-agent.sh refuses any short name starting with 'ctm-' for exactly this reason — the two namespaces must never collide.

backend.label: BACKEND
backend.workNote: During fan-out, **do not** run a build/test/formatter per file — just edit + use read-only `mcp__ide__getDiagnostics`; main runs it once, serially.
backend.domainNote: **if the project's CLAUDE.md or other documentation states a constraint (e.g. a migration/seed ban), always follow it.**

frontend.label: FRONTEND
frontend.workNote: During fan-out, **do not** run a build/dev server/formatter — just edit the file + use read-only `mcp__ide__getDiagnostics`; the build/verify is run once, serially, by main.
frontend.domainNote: **if the project's CLAUDE.md or other documentation states a constraint, always follow it.**
